description: First-touch cold outreach calibrated per avatar.
subject: {{avatar_hook_subject}}

local_champion.avatar_hook_subject: A faster way to handle your {{niche}} leads
local_champion.avatar_pain_reframe: You're great at the work. Following up on every lead in under 5 minutes is a whole other job — one that's costing you booked jobs every week.
local_champion.avatar_cta: Reply with your phone number and I'll send you a 2-minute loom showing how it works for a {{niche}} business your size.
local_champion.avatar_proof: One pressure washing operator in Orlando went from 18 booked jobs/month to 34 in 60 days just by responding to leads in under 5 minutes.

solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_pain_reframe: Every new client doubles your operational load. You sell judgment, but you're spending 40% of your week on delivery admin.
solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_cta: If this is a fair read, I'd share a 15-minute leverage diagnostic — no pitch, just a map of where the 10 hours are hiding.
solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_proof: Most solo consultants I work with reclaim 8-12 hours/week by installing a system around the parts that aren't the judgment.

boutique_agency_founder.avatar_hook_subject: Agency margin recovery — a diagnostic read
boutique_agency_founder.avatar_pain_reframe: Project profitability that's invisible until invoices land. A senior leaving with 30% of delivery capacity. PMs reinventing the wheel on every engagement. You already know the symptoms.
boutique_agency_founder.avatar_cta: I'd walk you through the Margin Diagnostic on a 25-min call. No pitch deck — the output is yours to keep.
boutique_agency_founder.avatar_proof: A 12-person agency in Austin recovered 8 margin points in one quarter after installing the delivery playbook system. Named case study on request.

fractional_executive.avatar_hook_subject: Running 5+ clients without the context-switching tax
fractional_executive.avatar_pain_reframe: Context-switching between 5 clients destroys depth. You need a system that loads the right context before every meeting — without you rebuilding it each time.
fractional_executive.avatar_cta: Worth a 20-minute operator conversation? I'll show you the per-client context vault pattern.
fractional_executive.avatar_proof: Fractional CMOs using the pattern report 4-6 hours/week reclaimed across their portfolio.

technical_founder_operator.avatar_pain_reframe: You're tired of the SaaS tax and vendor lock-in. The business ops layer should be sovereign, self-hosted, and composable — but it never is.
technical_founder_operator.avatar_cta: Open source repo + architecture doc in reply if you want to see the reference deployment.
technical_founder_operator.avatar_proof: Runs on a single box, no cloud dependencies, bring your own Postgres and Ollama.

solo_operator.avatar_pain_reframe: You're wearing every hat. The hat that's slipping is marketing — because delivery always wins the day.
solo_operator.avatar_cta: Reply 'solo' and I'll send the 5-tool template pack that runs while you work.
solo_operator.avatar_proof: Solo operators using this pack hit their first $10K month without hiring.

agency_builder.avatar_pain_reframe: You're at the inflection where every new client makes margin worse. The fix isn't more headcount — it's systemized delivery.
agency_builder.avatar_cta: 25-minute call to walk through the Agency Margin Diagnostic?
agency_builder.avatar_proof: Agencies scaling from $1M to $3M using this playbook hold 35%+ margin through the growth.

creative_hustler.avatar_hook_subject: What's actually converting on your content
creative_hustler.avatar_pain_reframe: You produce content constantly. You have no idea which pieces are actually driving the revenue. The algorithm could change tomorrow and wipe it out.
creative_hustler.avatar_cta: Drop your handle — I'll run a free cross-platform resonance report in 24 hours.
creative_hustler.avatar_proof: Creators using the resonance report 2x'd their conversion from the same output volume.
